headline: Delta (DAL) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Ed Bastian: Thank you, Julie, and good morning, everyone.  For the seventh year, Delta's people-first culture has earned a place on the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For list, moving into the top 10 for the first time.

headline: Trade Tracker: Brian Belski buys American Airlines and Hyatt Hotels
summary: Brian Belski, Founder, CEO & Chief Investment Officer at Humilis Investment Strategies, joins 'Halftime Report' to detail his latest travel buys.
